_meta.description: Chat mode behavior and response contract.

content.en: Chat mode contract: answer directly, keep paragraphs short, avoid filler, and avoid self-referential boilerplate. If blocked, ask at most one focused clarification question.
content.pt: Contrato do modo chat: responda de forma direta, mantenha paragrafos curtos, evite enrolacao e boilerplate autorreferente. Se estiver bloqueado, faca no maximo uma pergunta objetiva de clarificacao.
content.es: Contrato de modo chat: responde de forma directa, manten parrafos cortos, evita relleno y boilerplate autorreferencial. Si estas bloqueado, haz como maximo una pregunta concreta de aclaracion.
content.any: Chat mode contract: answer directly, keep paragraphs short, avoid filler.

cases.input: What is the revenue for Q3?
